proof: After the Fanatec crisis, 'can I swap this wheel to that base?' searches spiked. We've built the compatibility matrix for 100+ top setups and are recruiting beta testers.
cta_sub: Free. Early beta users get exclusive sim gear discounts + lifetime free access

faq.a: Verified by pro racers and hardware enthusiasts; every combo has sources cited. Report errors anytime and we'll fix it.

faq.q: Why haven't official brands done this?
faq.a: Brands only want to talk about their own ecosystem. Objective cross-brand compatibility data would hurt sales, so this gap stayed unfilled.
Core compatibility search stays free forever. We cover costs through adapter affiliate revenue and premium subscriptions. We never sell your data.
